---
applyTo: "docs/**/*.md"
---

# Scoped rules for course content

- Keep each module ~8 minutes; lead with a concrete failure ("The pain"), not theory.
- Every pillar module must teach its four scorecard criteria and link to `/diagnose`.
- Use the `<BeforeAfter>` component for prompt-only vs harnessed comparisons.
- Prefer real, copy-pasteable file contents over placeholders.
- Internal links must resolve — run `npm run docs:build` (it fails on dead links) before claiming done.
